error.signature: CMake Error: Cannot specify link libraries for target which is not built by this project
error.regex: (Cannot specify link libraries for target|target.*not built by this project|target_link_libraries.*unknown)

verdict.summary: target_link_libraries references a nonexistent target. Typo or wrong order in CMakeLists.txt.

dead_ends.action: Use add_custom_target to make it visible
dead_ends.why_fails: add_custom_target is for custom commands, not linkable libraries
Target must exist before setting properties. add_executable must come FIRST.

workarounds.action: Ensure add_executable is called before target_link_libraries
Check for typos between add_executable and target_link_libraries
If target is in subdirectory, call add_subdirectory first
